title: Chicken Tagine
description: A classic Moroccan dish made with chicken cooked in a flavorful tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, and paprika. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tagine sauce, chicken broth, and coconut cream. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
